items.name: Green G Small Punk Shoulder Bag
items.description:
The G Punk Chain Small Shoulder Bag is crafted in a streamlined silhouette from smooth premium leather accented by shiny silver hardware. It has a classic-chic look made bolder by spike embellishment, a chain shoulder strap and a large turn-lock closure.

Made in partnership with Builder_Boy

items.name: Office Siren White Oversized Blouse
items.description: Wilsonkaki’s SS25 Collection 006 embodies the spirit of coastal life, envisioning a utopia filled with the intrigue and enigma of the ocean. This collection continues the brand’s concept of refined deconstruction by reimagining garment structures and inverting details, offering a fresh take on everyday wear. In line with the coastal-themed patterns in this collection, this shirt features a dramatic, oversized shell print on the front. Metal studs and rings are strewn across the graphic elements, evoking a heightened sense of summer suspense for the everyday.

items.name: Raw Darkness Vultures Hat
items.description:
Collab between Hyacinth UGC and Aeteris Fantasy
Purchase HERE: https://www.roblox.com/games/72687221433834/Exclusives-Limiteds-Hub
-
A hat worn by members of a pop group, many decades ago. This hat was customized for a performance of their hit song, Vulture. After their song rose to fame again due to the viral dance circulating on social media, official hats from the performance were created in honor of the song's resurgence decades later. The hat features a black fabric base, with high-quality resin pieces placed on top, most notably the vulture skull and the bone horns. The rims of the hat are adorned with metal-like spikes placed carefully around them. Lastly, the hat was textured to have a grungy, dark black metal look. Buy some of these hats for yourself!
-
